name: Milky Way Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease two 9-inch layer cake pans or one 9 x 12 pan.
2. Preheat oven to 325°F.
3. Combine the candy bars and 1 cup butter in a double boiler and melt over hot, but not boiling water, until melted. Set aside.
4. Cream together the remaining butter and sugar until light and creamy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well between each addition.
6. Dissolve baking soda in buttermilk and add to creamed mixture alternately with flour. Mix well.
7. Add melted candy bars and blend until smooth.
8. Pour batter into prepared pans.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes in the 9 x 12 pan or 40-50 minutes in layer pans. The cake should spring back when lightly touched.
10. Frost as desired.
